retrieved_result: Will changing my server on Speedtest.net change my connection? Get Support Now℠ The Basics How Speedtest.net Works Will changing my server on Speedtest.net change my connection? March 26, 2012 07:49Choosing a server on Speedtest.net simply affects which server you talk to during the test process. For your other online activity, you're talking to other servers.
